---
title: "Judith Fielder"
---

## Judith Fielder

**Dates:** (Otterbourne 1822/3-1852)

**Maiden name:** (Whorley)

### Description

widow of Thomas Fielder, railway porter

### Biography

She married (1850) Thomas Fielder (1812/3-1851). She is described by CMY as widowed and  dying of decline (15 March 1852), living at Bishopstoke.  She was the sister of Susan Whorley. They appear to have been daughters of Thomas Whorley (b. 1764/5), agricultural labourer, of Otterbourne. [1841, 51 censuses; marriage and death registers]

### Letters

- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
